creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Tue Dec 31 13:04:53 2013
New Revision: 338294
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/338294

Log:
  - Update to 0.39
  - Add LICENSE
  - Support STAGEDIR
  - Use single space after WWW:
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here
    - Fix and sort *_DEPENDS
    - Add TEST_DEPENDS
  
  Changes:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/SVN-Look/Changes
  PR:		ports/185199
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-SVN-Look/Makefile
  head/devel/p5-SVN-Look/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/p5-SVN-Look/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/p5-SVN-Look/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/devel/p5-SVN-Look/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-SVN-Look/Makefile	Tue Dec 31 13:04:47 2013	(r338293)
+++ head/devel/p5-SVN-Look/Makefile	Tue Dec 31 13:04:53 2013	(r338294)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	SVN-Look
-PORTVERSION=	0.38
+PORTVERSION=	0.39
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
@@ -10,17 +10,16 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Caching wrapper around the svnlook command
 
-BUILD_DEPENDS=	subversion>=1.7.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/subversion \
-		p5-URI>=0:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-URI \
-		p5-PathTools>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-PathTools
-RUN_DEPENDS=	subversion>=1.7.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/subversion \
-		p5-URI>=0:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-URI \
-		p5-PathTools>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-PathTools
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-List-MoreUtils>=0:${PORTSDIR}/lang/p5-List-MoreUtils \
+		p5-XML-Simple>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-Simple \
+		subversion>=1.7.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/subversion
+RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
+TEST_DEPENDS=	p5-URI>=0:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-URI
 
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
 
-MAN3=		SVN::Look.3
-
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/devel/p5-SVN-Look/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-SVN-Look/distinfo	Tue Dec 31 13:04:47 2013	(r338293)
+++ head/devel/p5-SVN-Look/distinfo	Tue Dec 31 13:04:53 2013	(r338294)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (SVN-Look-0.38.tar.gz) = 59e489ab1cf629fdfb3c731360d44af18907d6afb1a3f1e34eb52377567270c3
-SIZE (SVN-Look-0.38.tar.gz) = 15663
+SHA256 (SVN-Look-0.39.tar.gz) = aa0d3d5fffee3cf5ad32634a919c0ff9ca249bd9640ec5c090b4fb998730107b
+SIZE (SVN-Look-0.39.tar.gz) = 16233

Modified: head/devel/p5-SVN-Look/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-SVN-Look/pkg-descr	Tue Dec 31 13:04:47 2013	(r338293)
+++ head/devel/p5-SVN-Look/pkg-descr	Tue Dec 31 13:04:53 2013	(r338294)
@@ -10,4 +10,4 @@ use the information they need.  Moreover
 gathered buy calling the svnlook command is cached in the object,
 avoiding repetitious calls.
 
-WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/SVN-Look/
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/SVN-Look/

Modified: head/devel/p5-SVN-Look/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-SVN-Look/pkg-plist	Tue Dec 31 13:04:47 2013	(r338293)
+++ head/devel/p5-SVN-Look/pkg-plist	Tue Dec 31 13:04:53 2013	(r338294)
@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@
 %%SITE_PERL%%/SVN/Look.pm
-@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/SVN
 %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/SVN/Look/.packlist
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/SVN::Look.3.gz
 @dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/SVN/Look
 @dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/SVN
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/SVN
